name: pdfengines_metadata_write
description: Write XMP metadata (Author, Title, Copyright, Keywords, etc.) to one or more existing PDF files.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more PDF files to update metadata on.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: JSON string with metadata fields. Example: {"Author": "John Doe", "Title": "Report"}.

request_example.body: FormData with document.pdf file and metadata={"Author": "John Doe", "Title": "Annual Report 2026"}
